statements.sql:
select distinct `activities`.`id`, `activities`.`sector_id`, `activities`.`status` as `real_status`, `activities`.`region`, `activities`.`city`, `activities`.`cost`, DATE_FORMAT(activities.start_date, '%m/%Y') as formatted_start_date, DATE_FORMAT(activities.start_date, '%b/%Y') as formatted_start_date2, DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%m/%Y') as formatted_current_date, DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%b/%Y') as formatted_current_date2,
CASE
WHEN activities.status IS NULL AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_attchments WHERE activity_id = activities.id) THEN 27
WHEN activities.status IS NULL AND activities.start_date > CURDATE() THEN 25
WHEN activities.status IS NULL AND activities.start_date = CURDATE() THEN 26
WHEN activities.status IS NULL AND activities.start_date < CURDATE() THEN 28
ELSE activities.status
END as status
, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_attchments WHERE activity_id = activities.id) THEN 'ADDED ATTCHMENTS' ELSE 'EMPTY ATTCHMENTS' END as attchemnts_status, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_parcels WHERE activity_id = activities.id) THEN 'ADDED PARCELS' ELSE 'EMPTY PARCELS' END as parcels_status, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_beneficiaries WHERE activity_id = activities.id) THEN 'ADDED BENEFICIARIES' ELSE 'EMPTY BENEFICIARIES' END as beneficiaries_status, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_work_teams WHERE activity_id = activities.id) THEN 'ADDED WORK TEAMS' ELSE 'EMPTY WORK TEAMS' END as work_teams_status from `activities`

explain.query:
select distinct `activities`.`id`, `activities`.`sector_id`, `activities`.`status` as `real_status`, `activities`.`region`, `activities`.`city`, `activities`.`cost`, DATE_FORMAT(activities.start_date, '%m/%Y') as formatted_start_date, DATE_FORMAT(activities.start_date, '%b/%Y') as formatted_start_date2, DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%m/%Y') as formatted_current_date, DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%b/%Y') as formatted_current_date2, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN activities.status IS NULL AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_attchments WHERE activity_id = activities.id) THEN 27
                        WHEN activities.status IS NULL AND activities.start_date > CURDATE() THEN 25
                        WHEN activities.status IS NULL AND activities.start_date = CURDATE() THEN 26
                        WHEN activities.status IS NULL AND activities.start_date < CURDATE() THEN 28 
                        ELSE activities.status
                    END as status
                , CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_attchments WHERE activity_id = activities.id) THEN 'ADDED ATTCHMENTS' ELSE 'EMPTY ATTCHMENTS' END as attchemnts_status, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_parcels WHERE activity_id = activities.id) THEN 'ADDED PARCELS' ELSE 'EMPTY PARCELS' END as parcels_status, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_beneficiaries WHERE activity_id = activities.id) THEN 'ADDED BENEFICIARIES' ELSE 'EMPTY BENEFICIARIES' END as beneficiaries_status, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_work_teams WHERE activity_id = activities.id) THEN 'ADDED WORK TEAMS' ELSE 'EMPTY WORK TEAMS' END as work_teams_status from `activities`
